minting_now.name: ASMR Animation ft. Emoji Girl by Kaniza
Stop Doing This
minting_now.description:
# STOP DOING THIS

*A decentralized reaction system for the modern internet.*

Mint this NFT when you are tired of low-effort digital noise.

* Pixel collections
* Bot-driven engagement
* Empty hype cycles
* Recycled ideas dressed as innovation

But don’t just mint it.

Send it to the one who should

minting_now.name: Arcane Whispers
minting_now.description: Step into the shadows with Arcane Whispers, a unique and mysterious trading card NFT collection that delves into the forgotten corners of ancient lore. This collection features a clandestine order of guardians, mages, and seekers who have dedicated their lives to harnessing the power of obscure magi

minting_now.name: Sepin Artsy
minting_now.description: I started my Bitcoin art journey in 2020 with Sepim Art, inspired by the rise of Ordinals and the creativity emerging on Bitcoin. That experience shaped my path as a collector and deepened my appreciation for digital art culture.

minting_now.name: Silent Pixel V

minting_now.name: Sat0Formula
minting_now.description:
Sat0Formula is an independent degen NFT collection inspired by SATO’s formula-driven curve.

2300 NFTs. 2300 curve positions. One degen math cult.

Creator fees received by the collection will be used transparently to support SATO/ETH liquidity.

No promises. No guarantees. Just formula, memes, and

minting_now.name: INFESTED PUNKS

A random experiment led to the contamination of Ruju city.
This contamination led to an infection and people are dying. To keep the 3333 survivors alive, they are migrating onchain.

minting_now.name: YUGRA - 8 May (2026)
minting_now.description: This composition was written at night, before bed. I was overcome by heavy thoughts about the current times, the wars in the world, and the ubiquitous missile threat. As a result, this music was born.

minting_now.name: Mutants On Base

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.

upcoming.name: JellyMen
upcoming.description: 2222 semi-translucent companions oozing across Ethereum — built around original lore, 140 traits, and a small puddle of love.

upcoming.name: Minute Dial
upcoming.description:
**1440 wall-clock minutes. UTC+1. Three days.**

Each minute is mintable only during the actual wall-clock minute it represents. The first wallet to mint claims the unique slot. Subsequent mints during the same minute become serialized TAKEN editions: #1, #2, #3.

Some minutes will never be claimed.

upcoming.name: Her Silent Guardians
upcoming.description:

Azuki is heading to Licensing Expo Las Vegas. With a trading card game, an upcoming manga, and Shao at the heart of it all - we'll be on the floor with the world's biggest IPs. Testing a new ink and dip pens this morning. Been a while since I touched traditional medium, shaky ahh hands.  Azuki 5567 |

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden
